description: {"edges": "Irregular, some areas exhibiting necrosis and drying.", "veins": "Visible, but surrounded by necrotic tissue; vein clearing not prominent."} {"color": "Dark brown to black, with a yellow halo in some areas.", "shape": "Irregular, often angular, and coalescing. Some lesions appear target-like with concentric rings."} Symptoms are widespread across the leaf surface, with a concentration towards the distal portion. Lesions are not uniformly distributed, but clustered.
